extraction.one_line_summary: JACOBSEN Fabio won the sprint finish after peloton stayed together despite fears of crosswind splits on exposed Danish coastal roads
tactical_patterns: B&B Hotels deliberately dropped riders on first KOM to let ROLAND teammate chase alone, two-versus-two tactical positioning backfired.
Headwind conditions neutered expected crosswind chaos along northern coast, fundamentally changed predicted split dynamics despite narrow roads.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: second place again after thinking he won momentarily, twice in two days lost sprint finishes he believed secured
rider_signals.ROLAND Pierre: neutral: most experienced rider in race (13th Tour start, 11 finishes since 2009) but team tactics failed KOM jersey ambition
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: solo Dane swept all three KOM points in two-man break with BYSTROM, polka dot jersey on home roads
